title: Verify INSIGHTS contract discovery
preconditions: A built INSIGHTS operation registry contains active and deferred policies.
steps: Request discovery, help, and schema using compatible and incompatible versions; inspect operation order, policy status, mutability, authority, idempotency, limits, errors, exits, fingerprints, and payload exclusions.
expected: Every FR-INSIGHTS-CONTRACT-DISCOVERY criterion holds; deferred signals advertise no executable policy; incompatible discovery returns one metadata-only compatibility failure.
